results.name: opaline effect
results.description: Whenever your stuff becomes the target of a spell and/or ability, you draw a card.

results.name: open pose
results.description: Arms outstretched either side of the body, typically conveying openness or confidence.

results.name: opponent-discard matters
results.description: Cards that reward you for making opponents discard cards from their hand. See also [hate empty hand](hate-empty-hand) for cards that throw a party in the aftermath.

results.name: oran-rief forest
results.description: Oran-Rief, the Vastwood, a location on the continent of Tazeem in Zendikar.

results.name: original orochi design
results.description: Originally, Orochi had legs, before new lore and design in Kamigawa: Neon Dynasty changed them to have a naga-like serpentine bottom

results.name: oriq
results.description: Extus and his band of mages.

results.name: orochi ability
results.description: Freeze creatures with combat damage. This ability was used on Orochi in Kamigawa.

results.name: ororo munroe
results.description: From Marvel Comics, an X-man better known as Storm.
